description: Get ready to float in comfort and style with these floaters from adidas. Comfortable and sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trekking trail.UpperSynthetic straps on the forefoot, collar and ankle, with velcro fasteners and clip-lock buckle to attain a snug FitElasticated portion on back strap for perfect fitPadded inner lining on straps for greater comfortPrinted logo on the midfoot and ankle strapsFirm footbed with slightly elevated pattern for a massage feel and all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with heavy-duty multi-directional lugs for durability, grip and tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortWash careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
